title: Trump Winds Down the War He Started With Goals Unmet

title: Israel Counts the Ways That Netanyahu’s Iran Strategy Failed
summary: The U.S.-Iran framework agreement appears to omit some of the most important provisions that Israel wanted.

summary: Secret memos show that the White House debated last year, to a greater degree than previously known, whether to limit habeas corpus rights for undocumented immigrants.

summary: President Trump sat ringside beside his wife, Melania Trump, for an event that used the trappings of the White House for a U.F.C. brawl.

summary: A day after the National Symphony Orchestra played perhaps its final notes at the Kennedy Center for years, mixed martial artists brawled outside the White House.

summary: The first half of the year had few big, buzzy hits. But there were some nice surprises (“Widow’s Bay”) and returning favorites (“The Comeback”).

title: The Pain of Caring for a Parent Who Abused You
summary: The United States is reliant on unpaid family caregivers, and millions of adult children are caring for parents who didn’t really care for them.

title: After Russia Attacks Kyiv With Missiles and Drones, Historic Orthodox Cathedral Burns
summary: A bishop reported that many holy items had been recovered from the church, at the site of the Perchersk monastery, a revered place for the Ukrainian and Russian Orthodox faiths.

summary: Even though negotiations will begin for Ukraine to join the bloc, the path ahead is a long one.

summary: Ukraine is running out of American-made Patriot air-defense interceptors, and is pleading for more.

summary: Britain said it would ban social media access for children under 16 starting in 2027, joining several other countries introducing similar measures.

summary: A gunman believed he was defending the crowd, then killed an innocent protester. The legal case is complicated.
